steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that “African languages also made important contributions to the Puerto Rican dialect,” establishing an origin relationship that needs to be expressed in the blank.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The blank needs a word capturing how Puerto Rican vowel sounds originate from or connect to Yoruba. 'Traced' expresses exactly this — vowels can be traced back to (originate from) a language. 'Announced,' 'offered,' and 'surrendered' don't express source or origin and create illogical phrases with 'to a language.' That matches choice A — A is correct.
